news.headline: Arthur Cashin, known for bringing NYSE floor expertise to television, passes away at the age of 83.
Certain Trump nominees could challenge his influence over Senate Republicans, raising questions regarding their support.
Hoonigan completes financial restructuring, emerges from Chapter 11 on Oct 15, 2024, ensuring continued leadership in aftermarket industry.
news.summary: Wheel Pros, LLC, operating as Hoonigan, alongside its North American affiliates, a prominent supplier of aftermarket vehicle upgrades, revealed the completion of its financial restructuring after exiting Chapter 11. The Company's Plan of Reorganization was confirmed on October 15, 2024, establishing a solid financial base for Hoonigan's future endeavors. This development signifies a fresh start for the company, enabling it to persist in providing innovative vehicle enhancements.

news.headline: Extra Space announces $300M add-on offering of 5.700% Senior Notes due 2028. Leading self-storage operator.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Salt Lake City, Extra Space Storage Inc. ("Extra Space") revealed that its operating partnership, Extra Space Storage LP, is a prominent owner and operator of self-storage facilities in the United States. Extra Space is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol EXR and is part of the S&P 500 index. This announcement signifies the company's significant presence in the industry and its role as a leading player in the market.

news.headline: Diane Leopold to retire from Dominion Energy on June 1, 2025, after 36 years in the industry.
news.summary: Richmond, Virginia - On December 2, 2024, Dominion Energy revealed that Diane Leopold, the current executive vice president and chief operating officer, is set to retire on June 1, 2025. With a noteworthy 36-year tenure in the energy sector, Leopold has been a part of Dominion Energy for the past 30 years. Dominion Energy, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol D, made the announcement.

news.headline: Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) declares a quarterly cash dividend of $0.4125 per common stock, payable on Dec. 31, 2024.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Pittsburgh, the Board of Directors of Wesco International (NYSE: WCC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.4125 per share on all outstanding common stock. The dividend will be distributed on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Oshkosh Corp appoints Matthew Field as CFO effective December 16, 2024, succeeding Michael Pack. Field brings 20+ years of experience in automotive and aerospace sectors.
news.summary: Oshkosh Corporation, a prominent provider of specially designed vehicles and equipment, has appointed Matthew Field as its new chief financial officer (CFO), effective December 16, 2024. Field will be taking over from Michael Pack, who assumed the role of president of the Company’s Vocational segment earlier in the year. Field, with a background of over two decades in the automotive and aerospace industries, has a proven history of effective financial management. Oshkosh Corporation is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol OSK.

news.headline: Credo reported Q2 FY2025 results with revenue of $72.0M (up 20.6% QoQ, 63.6% YoY) and net income of $12.3M. Q3 revenue expected $115M-$125M.
news.summary: Credo Technology Group Holding Ltd reported financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, ending on November 2, 2024. The highlights include a revenue of $72.0 million, showing a 20.6% quarter-over-quarter increase and a 63.6% year-over-year growth. The GAAP gross margin was reported at 63.2%, and non-GAAP gross margin at 63.6%. The GAAP operating expenses were $53.9 million, and non-GAAP operating expenses were $37.6 million. The GAAP net loss was $(4.2) million, while non-GAAP net income was $12.3 million. They had an ending cash balance of $383.0 million. The CEO noted that the company observed record revenue growth due to increasing demand driven by AI deployments and customer relationships. For the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, they expect revenue between $115.0 and $125.0 million, with projected gross margins and operating expenses. They also provided information on their conference call and discussed non-GAAP financial measures. The company's mission is to offer high-speed solutions for wired connections in the data infrastructure market.

news.headline: Zscaler's Q1 FY2025 revenue grows 26% YoY to $628M, with calculated billings reaching $516.7M and deferred revenue at $1.78B. GAAP net loss is $12.1M, while non-GAAP net income is $124.3M. Operating expenses totaled $517.16M. For Q2 FY2025, revenue is expected to be $633M-$635M. Full-year FY2025 revenue projected at $2.623B-$2.643B.
news.summary: Zscaler, Inc., a cloud security company, reported strong financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025. Revenue reached $628 million, a 26% increase year-over-year, with calculated billings up 13% to $516.7 million. Deferred revenue grew by 27% to $1.78 billion. The company reported a GAAP net loss of $12.1 million, an improvement from $33.5 million loss in the previous year, while non-GAAP net income rose to $124.3 million from $86.4 million. Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments totaled $2.71 billion. Zscaler highlighted milestones in their platform scalability and announced key appointments and partnerships. The company provided a financial outlook for the second quarter and full fiscal year 2025, forecasting revenue of $633-635 million for Q2 and approximately $2.623-2.643 billion for the full year. The company will be discussing these results in a conference call and participating in upcoming investor conferences.

news.headline: Credo Technology Group's Q2 earnings beat estimates by 40%, with EPS of [specific number not provided].
news.summary: On Monday, December 2, 2024, Credo Technology Group (NASDAQ: CRDO) released its Q2 earnings results at 04:05 PM. The company exceeded estimated earnings by 40.0%, unveiling an EPS of [specific number omitted]. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Zscaler (NASDAQ: ZS) beat estimated earnings by 22%, reporting an EPS of $0.77 in Q1. Check Benzinga.com for details.
news.summary: Zscaler (NASDAQ:ZS) recently disclosed its Q1 earnings on Monday, December 2, 2024, at 04:05 PM. The company exceeded projected earnings by 22.0%, revealing an EPS of $0.77. for more details on this report, please visit the financial news website Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Cleanspark (CLSK) Q4 earnings disappoint, missing estimated earnings by -50%, reporting EPS of $-0.27.
news.summary: Cleanspark (NASDAQ:CLSK) released its Q4 earnings on Monday, December 2, 2024, at 04:05 PM. Investors were informed that the company fell short of expected earnings by -50.0%, with an EPS of $-0.27 instead of the projected figure. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Zscaler Q1 earnings report: Revenue beats at $628M, EPS exceeds at $0.77, total revenue up 26%, deferred revenue at $1.783.7B.
news.summary: Zscaler Inc (NASDAQ:ZS) released its fiscal first-quarter financial results after markets closed on Monday. The report revealed a revenue figure of $628 million for Q1, surpassing the consensus estimate of $606.19 million. In terms of earnings, the cybersecurity company reported adjusted earnings of 77 cents per share, exceeding analyst predictions of 63 cents per share. Total revenue experienced a 26% increase year-over-year, with deferred revenue also rising by 27% to $1.783.7 billion. Additionally, calculated billings saw a 13% year-over-year growth to reach $516.7 million. The company generated $331.3 million in cash flow from operations during the quarter. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Amer Sports, Inc. plans public offering of 34M ordinary shares, with underwriters having option for 5.1M more. Proceeds for outstanding debt.
news.summary: Helsinki, Finland - Amer Sports, Inc. revealed the initiation of a public offering of 34,000,000 ordinary shares as per the recent announcement. The company, listed as (NYSE: AS), is a prominent global entity known for its renowned range of sports and outdoor brands. Additionally, as part of the offering, Amer Sports has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to procure up to an extra 5,100,000 ordinary shares. The primary aim of the company behind this offering is to utilize the net proceeds for the repayment of a segment of their prevailing borrowings.

news.headline: KPS Capital Partners to acquire Crane Company's Engineered Materials business, a leading provider of fiberglass products.
news.summary: A prominent supplier of fiberglass reinforced plastic composite goods based in New York, KPS Capital Partners, LP ("KPS"), revealed recent acquisition news on Dec 2, 2024. The company shared that, via a freshly established affiliate, it has finalized a deal to procure the Engineered Materials branch of Crane. This move will significantly add to KPS's product range and market presence, showcasing strong growth potential. This acquisition marks a substantial investment by KPS, demonstrating its commitment to expanding within the industry.

news.headline: OPEC is likely, at its meeting on Thursday, to extend its latest oil output cuts until the end of Q1 2025 – OPEC+ Sources.
French far-right party led by Marine Le Pen vows to overthrow the government.
SoundHound AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: SOUN) to participate in investor conferences. Live broadcast on Dec 4 at 3:15pm PT/4:15pm MT/6:15pm ET.
news.summary: SoundHound AI, Inc., a renowned voice artificial intelligence company listed on Nasdaq as SOUN, shared their participation in upcoming investor conferences. Nitesh Sharan, the CFO, will join the UBS Global Technology and AI Conference in Scottsdale, AZ. The event will be live-streamed on December 4 at 3:15pm PT, 4:15pm MT, and 6:15pm ET. Keyvan Mohajer, the CEO, and Nitesh Sharan, the CFO, will also take part in the event.

news.headline: SLB Capturi finishes building the first industrial-scale carbon capture plant at a cement facility in Norway.
news.summary: A notable achievement has been made by SLB Capturi in completing the construction of a carbon capture plant at Heidelberg Materials’ cement facility in Brevik, Norway. The plant, which includes the carbon capture system, compression system, heat integration system, intermediate storage, and loadout facilities, is now fully assembled. Following this milestone, testing and commissioning processes are set to take place. Once operational, this will be the world's first commercial-scale carbon capture plant.

news.headline: nCino (NASDAQ: NCNO) to join upcoming investor conferences in Dec. 2024 as a key banking solutions provider.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina on December 2, 2024, prominent banking solutions provider nCino, Inc. (NASDAQ: NCNO) declared its involvement in upcoming investor conferences. The company, known for its top-tier intelligent banking services, aims to showcase its offerings to a wider audience.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency prices dip: Bitcoin at $96,068.16 (-0.98%), Ethereum $3,618.32 (-2%), Dogecoin $0.4257 (-0.5%). Traders predict $100K Bitcoin breakout with a 20-25% correction. Large transaction volume fell by 12.5% and $667.81 million liquidated in the past 24 hours. U.S. government transferred $1.92 billion BTC to a new address. Important developments in crypto regulation and Bitcoin institutionalization highlighted.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are seeing a decline, with selected altcoins recording gains. Bitcoin is at $96,068.16 (-0.98%), Ethereum at $3,618.32 (-2%), Solana at $224.74 (-4.5%), Dogecoin at $0.4257 (-0.5%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00002918 (-4.3%). Data from IntoTheBlock shows a decrease in large transaction volume and daily active addresses. Coinglass reports 224,165 traders being liquidated for $667.81 million in the last 24 hours. Arkham Intelligence notes the U.S. government moving $1.92 billion BTC to a new address. Developments include insights on Trump’s return affecting crypto regulation, approval prospects for an Ethereum ETF with staking, concerns over Bitcoin's institutionalization, and issues related to Bitcoin ETFs.

news.headline: Zentalis Pharmaceuticals grants stock options to new CEO, CMO, and 5 employees totaling over 4.5M shares on Dec 2, 2024.
news.summary: Zentalis Pharmaceuticals, Inc. announced equity awards on Dec 2, 2024: Julie Eastland, CEO, received non-qualified stock options for 3,028,800 shares; Dr. Ingmar Bruns, CMO, received options for 712,650 shares; and 5 new employees received options for 753,660 shares collectively. These awards were granted under the 2022 Inducement Plan in conjunction with their employment.

news.headline: OptiSigns to showcase digital signage solutions as Platinum Sponsor at DSE 2024 in Vegas.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Houston, OptiSigns, a prominent provider of digital signage software solutions, shared its excitement about being a Platinum Sponsor at Digital Signage Experience (DSE) 2024 in Las Vegas, Nevada. The event is scheduled for December and is set to be a major industry gathering.

news.headline: Founder Jeff Sarmiento successfully transitions ownership of Greater Bay Plumbing to buyer Dan, facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions.
news.summary: With the assistance of Viking Mergers & Acquisitions, a deal was completed in Sarasota, Florida on December 2, 2024. Jeffrey Sarmiento, the founder of Greater Bay Plumbing, has handed over ownership of the business to Dan, a strategic buyer. Over the years, Sarmiento transformed Greater Bay Plumbing into the top plumbing service provider in Sarasota.

news.headline: CAVA (NYSE: CAVA) to participate in Morgan Stanley Global Consumer and Retail Conference on Dec 4, 2024. CEO and CFO will attend.
news.summary: WASHINGTON--CAVA Group, Inc. (NYSE: CAVA) revealed its involvement in the Morgan Stanley Global Consumer and Retail Conference on December 4, 2024. Brett Schulman, Co-Founder and CEO, alongside Tricia Tolivar, CFO, will engage in 1x1 meetings and a fireside chat at 10:15 AM EST. The event's replay and fireside chat will be accessible afterwards.

news.headline: Seritage Growth Properties repaid $15 million toward $1.6 billion loan from Berkshire Hathaway, totaling $1.36 billion repaid since Dec 2021.
news.summary: Seritage Growth Properties (SRG), a real estate company specializing in retail, residential, and mixed-use properties, disclosed a voluntary prepayment of $15 million on November 27, 2024, towards its $1.6 billion term loan from Berkshire Hathaway Life Insurance Company of Nebraska. This prepayment brings the total repayments to $1.36 billion since December 2021. This move demonstrates the Company's commitment to reducing its debt and improving its financial position.

news.headline: BIP Investment Corp. to redeem all Series 1 Preferred Shares after special meeting voting results, on Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners L.P.'s subsidiary, BIP Investment Corporation (BIPIC), reported the outcome of the special meeting for holders of its senior preferred shares, series 1. The meeting, held virtually on Dec. 02, 2024, revealed that BIPIC plans to redeem all existing Preferred Shares for cash on December 5, 2024. BIPIC's ticker symbols are TSX: BIK.PR.A, while Brookfield Infrastructure's tickers are NYSE: BIP and TSX: BIP.UN.

news.headline: Dow Jones dipped, Intel's gains faded after CEO exit. Warren Buffett stock on 44% run clears entry. Tesla rose.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline with the Dow Jones dropping, despite one of Warren Buffett's stocks making a significant entry. Tesla saw an increase in its standing on the market, whereas Intel's gains diminished. The CEO exit at Intel seemed to affect its performance negatively. It is noteworthy that the Warren Buffett stock that showed promising growth managed to clear the entry by a notable 44%. Overall, the market presented mixed results with these key players making waves.

news.headline: Lumina Gold to draw US$6 million from US$300 million deal with Wheaton Precious Metals.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 2, 2024, Lumina Gold Corp. (TSXV: LUM) (OTCQB: LMGDF) shared news about their agreement with Wheaton Precious Metals International Ltd. The company happily reported on the US$300 million precious metals purchase arrangement (PMPA) with Wheaton.

news.headline: Centerspace to pay $0.75 per share as quarterly dividend on Jan 13, 2025, for shareholders and unitholders.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Centerspace's Board of Trustees revealed their decision to issue a standard quarterly distribution of $0.75 per share/unit. This dividend will be distributed on January 13, 2025, to all common shareholders and unitholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on the allocated date.

news.headline: Energy Services of America acquires Tribute Contracting & Consultants, LLC, an underground utility contractor. (Characters: 103)
news.summary: Energy Services of America Corporation, a publicly traded company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol ESOA, recently finalized the acquisition of Tribute Contracting & Consultants, LLC in Huntington, West Virginia on December 2, 2024. Tribute is recognized as a leading underground utility contractor employing a significant number of workers. This transaction marks a significant milestone for Energy Services as they enhance their portfolio and expand their operations within the sector.

news.headline: ADC Therapeutics in Switzerland grants 34,900 options to new employees under Inducement Plan, as a leader in ADCs.
news.summary: In Lausanne, Switzerland on December 2, 2024, ADC Therapeutics SA (NYSE: ADCT), a prominent player in antibody drug conjugates, revealed the granting of options to acquire a total of 34,900 shares of the company. This move marks a significant development for the commercial-stage global leader in the industry.

news.headline: Provident Bancorp, Inc. adopts stock repurchase program. Board approves plan allowing company to repurchase shares.
news.summary: Today, Provident Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: PVBC), the holding company for BankProv, shared its decision to implement a new stock repurchase program. The Board of Directors approved this program, allowing the company to buy back shares. The details of the program specify that the Company may repurchase up to a certain number of shares, providing a potential benefit to its shareholders. This move demonstrates the Company's confidence in its financial position and future performance.

news.headline: J.M. Smucker Co. sells Voortman® brand to Second Nature Brands, updates net sales outlook for FY 2025.
news.summary: A company based in Orrville, Ohio, revealed on December 2, 2024, that they have completed the sale of their Voortman® business to Second Nature Brands. The company, known as The J.M. Smucker Co. and traded on NYSE under the ticker symbol SJM, had initially disclosed the agreement for this transaction.

news.headline: Revolution Medicines, Inc. starts public offering of common stock to raise up to $600 million, with an option to add $90 million more.
news.summary: Revolution Medicines, Inc., based in Redwood City, California, announced on December 2, 2024, that it has started an underwritten public offering to sell a maximum of $600.0 million worth of its common stock (Nasdaq: RVMD). The company, focused on developing targeted therapies for patients with RAS-addicted cancers, is offering all the shares of common stock. Additionally, Revolution Medicines plans to provide the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to an additional $90.0 million of common stock. The completion of the offering, as well as its size and terms, depends on market and other conditions, with no definite assurance on its finalization timeframe.

news.headline: BWXT team secures $3 billion contract for DOE's West Valley Project for cleanup.
news.summary: A team led by BWXT has recently been granted a significant contract worth $3 billion for the cleanup of the Department of Energy's West Valley Demonstration Project in Lynchburg, Virginia. This contract signifies a substantial investment in environmental remediation efforts and reflects the urgency of addressing the challenges posed by the project.

news.headline: Altus Power CEO to attend NY conferences on Dec 4 and 5; largest clean power provider. #AltusPower #RenewableEnergy.
news.summary: Altus Power, a leading provider of clean electric power, shared that CEO Gregg Felton is set to speak at upcoming industry events. These include a fireside chat at the Jefferies Renewables & Clean Energy Conference on December 4 and a panel discussion at the Bank of America Clean Energy Symposium on December 5, both in New York. The company, listed on NYSE as AMPS, focuses on large-scale commercial clean energy solutions. Felton's participation highlights Altus Power's commitment to addressing rising energy demand.

news.headline: Fed’s Williams: What the Fed does with policy depends on incoming data.
Fed’s Williams: Monetary policy remains in restrictive stance.
Fed’s Williams: The job market unlikely to be source of higher inflation.
Fed’s Williams: I expect inflation to continue to gradually ebb to 2%.
Total number of voting rights and shares held by a company as of Nov 30, 2024, disclosed in a news article.
news.summary: As of November 30, 2024, the Company has disclosed that the total number of voting rights stands at X and the total number of shares amounts to Y.

news.headline: MacroGenics (Nasdaq: MGNX) to partake in investor conference for cancer therapeutics on Dec. 02, 2024.
news.summary: MacroGenics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as MGNX and specializing in monoclonal antibody-based cancer therapeutics, will have its management team attend an upcoming investor conference in December 2024. The company, based in Rockville, MD, is dedicated to discovering, developing, and marketing innovative treatments for cancer. Its participation in the conference signifies its commitment to engaging with investors and sharing insights about its operations.

news.headline: Erik Mayer named VP of Clean Energy Solutions at CF Industries, focusing on decarbonization, low-carbon ammonia/nitrogen products.
news.summary: Northbrook, Illinois - CF Industries Holdings, Inc. revealed the appointment of Erik Mayer as vice president of clean energy solutions. Mayer, now leading the strategic initiative on decarbonization and clean energy, will oversee the production of low-carbon ammonia and nitrogen products. Additionally, he will focus on expanding the clean energy solutions team within CF Industries. Mayer aims to boost collaboration across the company while exploring new applications for clean energy products. CF Industries is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CF.

news.headline: NN, Inc. CFO Chris Bohnert to present at Noble Capital Markets' NobleCon20 on Dec. 3 at Florida Atlantic Univ. Meeting investors.
news.summary: An industrial company, NN, Inc., publicly traded on NASDAQ under NNBR, specializing in high-precision components and assemblies, shared news that Chris Bohnert, the CFO, will speak at the Noble Capital Markets’ NobleCon20 Twentieth Annual Emerging Growth Equity Conference. This event will take place at Florida Atlantic University, Executive Education Complex on Dec. 3, 2024, at 1:30 p.m. ET. During the conference, management will engage in one-on-one and group sessions with investors attending the event.

news.headline: Voyageur Mineral Explorers Corp. appointed Brian Howlett to its Board, with Ross Orr stepping down. Howlett has 35 years experience and currently serves as CEO of Hemlo Explorers Inc. and Independent Chairman of Bitfarms Ltd. Howlett graduated in 1982 with a B. Comm. in finance from Concordia University and received his CMA designation in 1989.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 2, 2024, Voyageur Mineral Explorers Corp. (CSE: VOY) has officially added Brian Howlett to its Board of Directors. With over 35 years of experience in both operational and financial roles, Howlett currently serves as the Chief Executive Officer of Hemlo Explorers Inc. and as the Independent Chairman of Bitfarms Ltd. He earned his B. Comm. in finance from Concordia University in 1982 and achieved his CMA designation in 1989. Howlett's appointment follows the departure of Ross Orr from the Board.

news.headline: Jasper Therapeutics doses first patient in phase 1b/2a study of briquilimab for asthma. Study name: ETESIAN, evaluating single briquilimab dose in asthma patients.
news.summary: Redwood City, California, December 02, 2024 - Jasper Therapeutics, Inc. announced that the first patient has been dosed in their Phase 1b/2a clinical challenge study, ETESIAN, assessing briquilimab for allergic asthma. Jasper, a biotech company traded as JSPR on Nasdaq, is developing briquilimab, an antibody therapy targeting c-Kit (CD117) for conditions like chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU), chronic inducible urticaria (CIndU), and asthma. The study involves a single subcutaneous dose of briquilimab in asthma patients.

news.headline: Fed’s Williams: Further progress on inflation may be uneven.
Fed’s Williams: I see unemployment rate between 4%-4.25% over coming months.
Fed’s Williams: I expect US GDP at 2.5% this year, might be higher.
